news.headline: Shell plc announces the selection of EY as its new auditor, ending a 97-year relationship with PwC.
Care Access in Thousand Oaks invites physicians to Open House to offer no-cost health screenings for patients, including tests for Lp(a), A1c, lipids, and creatinine.
news.summary: A company based in Thousand Oaks, California, known as Care Access, is looking to collaborate with nearby doctors to provide patients with complimentary health screenings. These screenings will include tests for Lp(a), A1c, lipids, and creatinine.

news.headline: Emeritus named to 2025 GSV 150 list of top 150 transformational growth companies in digital learning.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, Emeritus, a prominent provider of accessible and affordable high-quality education worldwide, was included in the prestigious 2025 edition of the GSV 150. The GSV 150 is an annual list compiled by GSV, highlighting the top 150 companies catering to individuals, businesses, and governments. This recognition solidifies Emeritus' position as a global leader in education, impacting numerous stakeholders with its offerings.

news.headline: Generative AI and cybersecurity are top risks for healthcare providers in 2025 according to Kodiak Solutions.
news.summary: In Indianapolis, a recent study by Kodiak Solutions has identified Generative AI and cybersecurity as two of the primary risks for healthcare provider organizations by 2025. These threats are projected to significantly impact the industry, highlighting the need for enhanced security measures. This research emphasizes the growing importance of addressing these issues, as they pose potential challenges to the healthcare sector in the near future. The findings underscore the necessity for proactive measures to safeguard against the evolving landscape of risks in healthcare.

news.headline: Mad Catz will reveal new gaming peripherals at an invite-only CES event, showcasing latest innovations.
news.summary: Hong Kong-based Mad Catz is set to showcase cutting-edge prototypes at a private CES event. The renowned company will reveal new products to a select group of attendees. This exclusive unveiling will feature the latest advancements in technology and innovation. The event has generated significant buzz within the industry, with anticipation high for the new reveals. Mad Catz's presence at CES is expected to draw attention from tech enthusiasts and professionals alike. The company's dedication to pushing the boundaries of design and functionality is evident in the upcoming prototypes. Stay tuned for updates on this exciting event.

news.headline: Denmark construction industry output to grow by 2.7% in 2024, reaching EUR 20.76 billion. CAGR of 2.6% expected to 2028.
news.summary: A report on the Denmark Construction Industry reveals projected growth of 2.7% to EUR 20.76 billion in 2024. Despite facing challenges in certain sectors, Denmark's construction industry shows promise for substantial expansion. The industry is anticipated to experience steady growth in the upcoming years. This information is part of the "Denmark Construction Industry Databook Series - Market Size & Forecast by Value and Volume (area and units), Q2 2024 Update" available through ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: Horses experience intense emotions, confirmed by animal emotions science. Owners should understand horses' needs.
news.summary: In a study conducted in ESPOO, Finland on December 12, 2024, it has been revealed that animals experience a wide range of emotions such as joy, fear, and affection. This research, delving into animal emotions, solidifies the prior beliefs held by numerous animal owners. The study emphasizes that while animals do indeed feel intense emotions, these emotions may not always align with what owners traditionally perceive. This discovery sheds new light on the emotional spectrum of animals and highlights the need for a deeper understanding of their feelings.

news.headline: AveriSource introduces AveriSource Platform™ 3.0, new application modernization solutions. Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024 in Dallas, AveriSource, a prominent independent software vendor based in the United States specializing in application modernization solutions, unveiled the release of AveriSource Platform™ 3.0. This latest version marks a significant advancement in their offerings, featuring cutting-edge enhancements and capabilities.

news.headline: Introducing Lil Rhody Laugh Riot: New comedy fest in Providence with Kevin Hart, Leslie Jones, Aziz Ansari, Chris Distefano, Hannah Berner, Michael Blaustein & others. Inaugural event spans four days. Providence Culinary Collective also features.
news.summary: The inaugural four-day comedy extravaganza has announced its first wave of performers, featuring top comedians such as Kevin Hart, Leslie Jones, Aziz Ansari, Chris Distefano, Hannah Berner, Michael Blaustein, and others. Alongside the comedy event, the first-ever Providence Culinary Collective will also be held during the same weekend. The event is set to take place over four days, showcasing a diverse lineup of comedians and culinary talents. This exciting event will bring together a total of seven well-known comedians and numerous culinary experts for a weekend filled with laughter and gourmet delights.

news.headline: IBM study predicts vehicles will be software-defined and AI-powered by 2035, reflecting industry transition trends.
news.summary: In a recent report released by the IBM Institute for Business Value, it was revealed that the automotive industry is facing challenges amid a shifting landscape. The study, titled 'Automotive 2035', discusses the industry's struggle in moving away from its traditional products and business practices. This transition is proving to be unpredictable and complex. The report, published on December 12, 2024, sheds light on the various issues plaguing the sector as it looks towards the future. IBM, listed on NYSE as IBM, presents key insights into the industry's turbulent journey ahead, emphasizing the need for adaptation and innovation.

news.headline: Inventors from Australia develop versatile mounting bracket system, called Universal Dual Mount System (MJA-254), with multiple mounts from a single anchor point.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 12, 2024, two inventors from Kalaru, NSW, Australia, introduced a new product called the Universal Dual Mount System. The innovative mounting bracket offers multiple mounts using just one anchor point. This design presents a versatile solution, eliminating the need for multiple anchor points for different mounts.

news.headline: Amazon halted Microsoft Office rollout for a year due to security breaches.
Mesirow Institutional Sales and Trading hires Jason Handrinos with 15+ years exp to drive growth strategy in Asia and Europe.
news.summary: Handrinos, boasting over 15 years of experience in Institutional Capital Markets, has been appointed to enhance collaboration among current business entities, discover fresh revenue sources and business prospects, and boost presence in Asia and Europe. This newly established position forms a crucial component of the ongoing strategic development.

news.headline: Shell's subsidiary makes investment decision on Phase 3 Silvertip project, adding two wells to boost production in US GoM.
news.summary: Shell Offshore Inc., a subsidiary of Shell plc (Shell), has recently declared a Final Investment Decision (FID) on the Phase 3 Silvertip project based in the US Gulf of Mexico (GoM). This initiative aims to introduce two new wells at the Shell-operated Perdido spar. The project is anticipated to significantly enhance production rates in the region.

news.headline: JLL Income Property Trust partners with iCapital to bring core real estate to private wealth market, with $6.6 billion portfolio.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Chicago, JLL Income Property Trust disclosed a collaboration with iCapital1. JLL is a daily NAV REIT managed by institutions and listed on NASDAQ under ZIPTAX, ZIPTMX, ZIPIAX, and ZIPIMX. This trust holds around $6.6 billion in assets comprising of equity and debts in its portfolio. The partnership is a step towards enhancing their presence in the financial technology sector.

news.headline: Kodiak Gas Services prices underwritten offering of 5.5M shares of common stock, raising $232.9M for selling stockholder.
news.summary: Kodiak Gas Services, Inc. disclosed the pricing details of its recent underwritten offering of 5,500,000 shares of common stock by an affiliate of EQT Infrastructure III and EQT Infrastructure IV. The selling stockholder will generate gross proceeds of $232,925,000 through this Offering. It is important to note that Kodiak itself will not be selling any shares of its common stock as part of this transaction and will not be receiving any proceeds from the sale.

news.headline: ECB Sources: Some argued that ECB is overestimating growth, which could be below 1% next year under Trump tariffs.
ECB Sources: A handful of policymakers were initially in favour of a 50 bps cut.
US to sell $81 bln 3-month bills on December 16, to settle on December 19.
US to sell $22 bln reopened 5-year TIPS on December 19th, to settle on December 31st.
ECB slashes interest rates amid weakening economy, with rates decreasing since June due to slowing inflation. Plus risks from President-elect's plan for increased tariffs.
news.summary: Since June, the bank has been reducing rates in response to a decrease in inflation. However, there are other emerging concerns, such as the potential increase in tariffs pledged by President-elect Donald J. Trump.

news.headline: Kuwana City's "Global Festa 2024" showcased cultures with 180+ participants offering unique confectioneries and activities.
news.summary: In Kuwana, Japan, the city recently held "Global Festa 2024" at Kuwana Media Live on November 30th. The event saw a turnout of more than 180 participants, comprising Japanese as well as non-Japanese families. Attendees were treated to a wide array of confectioneries including the local specialty "Yasunaga mochi" and confectioneries from the various cultural backgrounds of non-Japanese residents in Kuwana. The festa also featured exhibitions of traditional attire, games, and activities representing different countries, along with colorful displays of country flags.

news.headline: US to sell $13 bln reopened 20-year bonds on December 17th, to settle on December 31st
US to sell $72 bln 6-month bills on December 16, to settle on December 19.
US PET bottle recycling rate in 2023 surpasses 40%, highest in decades. Recycled PET content in US bottles hits all-time high.
news.summary: A recent report by NAPCOR revealed significant milestones in PET recycling in North America. According to the 2023 PET Recycling Report, the PET recycling rate in North America has exceeded 40%. This marks a notable achievement in the effort to promote recycling and sustainability. The report also highlights other important milestones in PET recycling, showcasing the progress being made in reducing plastic waste and promoting a circular economy.

news.headline: NOVELIC to debut ASPER200 180° short-range radar at CES 2025, featuring a 79 GHz module. #innovation #radartechnology
news.summary: In Belgrade, Serbia on December 12, 2024, NOVELIC, a prominent company in short-range radar technology, will unveil a novel cost-effective radar module with a wide 180° field of view at CES 2025 in January. The new radar system, named ASPER200, operates at a frequency of 79 GHz.

news.headline: Warehouse robotics market expected to reach $15.1 billion by 2031, with growth in various product types and functions.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Redding, California, a recent market analysis was released indicating trends in the warehouse robotics sector. The report, focusing on various product types such as Autonomous Mobile Robots, Automated Guided Vehicles, and Articulated Robots, highlighted their functions like Picking & Placing, along with different payload capacities. The research also delved into the diverse end-user applications, with a particular focus on the Retail sector. This analysis provides valuable insights for stakeholders with an interest in this sector.

news.headline: Adani Group faces scrutiny globally as countries question ties following bribery and conspiracy indictments.
news.summary: Several nations in Asia, Africa, and other regions are increasingly severing ties with Gautam Adani, an Indian tycoon, following allegations of bribery and conspiracy made by American prosecutors.

news.headline: Proposal: U.S. invest $250B in Bitcoin to hold 1.8M coins, showing leadership in digital assets for economy.
news.summary: During a panel discussion at the Benzinga Future of Digital Assets conference, the notion of the U.S. creating a national Bitcoin reserve has been proposed. The suggestion involves investing a substantial $250 billion in Bitcoin, which has sparked discussions on the potential impacts on the U.S. economy. Anthony Pompliano, the founder of Professional Capital Management, put forward this idea, advocating for the U.S. government to dedicate the aforementioned sum to acquiring Bitcoin. This move could potentially make the U.S. the largest holder of Bitcoin, with an estimated reserve of around 1.8 million coins. Pompliano believes that such an investment would showcase the U.S.'s leadership in digital assets and enhance national financial security. He emphasized the importance by stating, "They should literally print $250 billion on day one and buy Bitcoin." This proposal opens up a dialogue on how this could influence the national debt trajectory, as detailed in the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Nasdaq falls 50 points; US initial jobless claims rise by 17,000 to 242,000. Real estate shares up 0.7%, energy shares down 0.7%.
news.summary: Stocks in the U.S. began the day with mixed results, as the Nasdaq Composite dropped by over 50 points. The Dow was down by 0.01% to 44,142.13, while the NASDAQ fell by 0.27% to 19,979.88. The S&P 500 also experienced a decrease, dropping by 0.14% to 6,075.73. Real estate sector shares saw an increase of 0.7%, while energy shares fell by 0.7%. Initial jobless claims in the U.S. rose by 17,000 to 242,000 during the first week of December, exceeding market estimates of 220,000. Palisade Bio, Inc. (NASDAQ: PALI) shares surged by 73% to $2.42. For more details, visit the full story on a specific financial news website.

news.headline: Five companies – CIBC, JDE Peet's, KPMG, McCarthy Tétrault, and Sanofi – honored with 2025 Catalyst Award for promoting women's representation and inclusion.
news.summary: Five major companies, CIBC, JDE Peet's, KPMG, McCarthy Tétrault, and Sanofi, will be honored at the upcoming Annual Gender Equity Conference and Dinner in New York on December 12, 2024. These companies are being recognized for their exceptional efforts in promoting women and inclusion in the workplace. The event aims to celebrate their outstanding performance in these areas.

news.headline: Bonk (BONK) catching up to Dogecoin (DOGE) and Shiba Inu (SHIB), performs better with market cap of $2.98 billion.
news.summary: Bonk (CRYPTO: BONK) is closely trailing Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB), showing slightly better performance compared to the two major competitors in the last 24 hours. In terms of numbers, Bonk is priced at $0.00003949 with a market capitalization of $2.98 billion, showing a 2% increase over the last 24-hour period but a decrease of 8.4% over the past week. Dogecoin, on the other hand, is valued at $0.4148 with a market cap of $60.9 billion, recording a 0.2% rise in the last 24 hours and an 8.1% decline over the week. Shiba Inu stands at $0.0000288 with a market cap of $16.9 billion, also experiencing a 0.2% increase in the last 24 hours along with a significant 10.1% drop over the week. Crypto trader Cold Blooded Shiller highlighted that Bonk's chart indicates a substantial retest is looming in the weekly period.

news.headline: Vortex Brands Co. (OTC: VTXB) to launch algorithmic trading operations with proprietary algorithms for fintech growth.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, Denver-based Vortex Brands Co. (OTC: VTXB) revealed its plans to enter the fintech sector by initiating algorithmic trading operations. The company is in the process of finalizing a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) to facilitate this strategic move, which aims to capitalize on proprietary algorithms known for their successful track record.

news.headline: Jeff Bezos to meet with Trump next week, per Bloomberg.
Poland Construction Industry to grow by 5.1% in 2024, reaching EUR 54.04 billion. CAGR of 7.3% to 2028 projected.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Poland Construction Industry Databook Series" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com, providing market size and forecast data for the industry. The construction sector in Poland is projected to experience a 5.1% growth, reaching EUR 54.04 billion by 2024. Although some construction segments may face challenges in the short term, Poland's construction industry is set to achieve substantial expansion. Continuous growth is anticipated in the upcoming years.

news.headline: NBA star seeks to grow success in business ventures, aiming to extend winning streak beyond court.
Jane Street considering taking over a portion of Brookfield office space. Discussions ongoing.
Ireland's construction industry to grow by 6.6% in 2024, reaching EUR 11.84 billion. Positive outlook for steady growth.
news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report on the Ireland Construction Industry forecasts significant growth in the sector. The industry is expected to increase by 6.6% to reach EUR 11.84 billion by 2024. Although facing challenges in some sectors currently, Ireland's construction industry is set for substantial expansion. This growth trend is anticipated to continue steadily in the coming years.

news.headline: Sunrise Senior Living attains WELL Equity Rating across all communities, setting new industry standard.
news.summary: Sunrise Senior Living, based in McLean, VA, made headlines on Dec. 12, 2024, by attaining the prestigious WELL Equity Rating for all its communities. This accomplishment establishes Sunrise as a trailblazer in promoting inclusivity and welcoming environments in senior living. The organization is the pioneer in this achievement within the senior living sector.

news.headline: 74% of finance teams are stuck with paper-based processes, hindering digital transformation - Yooz survey.
news.summary: In Dallas, a recent study by Yooz, a leading cloud-based purchase-to-pay (P2P) automation provider, highlights the persistent challenge faced by businesses due to outdated paper processes. The research indicates that 74% of finance teams are heavily dependent on paper workflows, impeding their potential for cost savings, agility, and sustainability. This issue poses operational risks and hinders digital transformation efforts despite advancements in technology. The study underscores the urgency for organizations to transition towards more efficient and modern digital solutions.

news.headline: Simon Business School in Rochester announces enhanced MS programs with focus on AI & tech, offering specialized studies and quicker graduation, delivering exceptional value for students.
news.summary: In Rochester, N.Y., the Simon Business School is making improvements to its full-time MS programs to provide students with more value. By introducing new core courses in artificial intelligence and technology, the school aims to better prepare graduates for tackling current business complexities and forthcoming opportunities. The enhanced program offers students increased specialization options, a quicker path to graduation, and a curriculum that concentrates on practical skills for in-demand sectors. This initiative is in line with the school's commitment to offering top-ranked MBA and MS programs, solidifying its position as a leading institution in STEM management education.

news.headline: Power Nickel Inc. shares core pictures showing successful mineralized intersections 125m down dip in Lion Zone drilling.
news.summary: In a recent press release on December 12, 2024, Power Nickel Inc. disclosed significant findings from their drilling operations. The exploration confirmed the existence of mineral deposits, located 125 meters below and 75 meters west of the known Lion Zone. The company, listed under TSXV as PNPN, OTCBB as PNPNF, and Frankfurt as IVV, expressed satisfaction with the findings.

news.headline: Tampa General Hospital opens new Cellular-Immunotherapy Transplant Unit for cancer treatment, making it more accessible.
news.summary: Recently, Tampa General Hospital unveiled a novel initiative, allowing patients with aggressive cancers to undergo cell therapy treatment as outpatients. This new outpatient Cellular-Immunotherapy Transplant Unit (CTU) opened on Dec. 12, 2024, in Tampa, Florida. This program marks a significant advancement in cancer care, offering patients the opportunity to receive specialized treatment under outpatient care.

news.headline: First We Feast, known for Hot Ones, becomes independent with founder Chris Schonberger and host Sean Evans in an eight-figure deal with investments from a consortium of companies.
news.summary: The renowned studio responsible for creating the popular series Hot Ones is set to transition into an independent company under the leadership of founder Chris Schonberger and Hot Ones host Sean Evans. This shift comes as a result of an impressive eight-figure agreement, with funding secured from a collective of companies. Despite the change in ownership, the multi-platform brand focused on food and pop culture will persist in generating content...

news.headline: VAYK renews JV to transform Rufus Rose House into top Airbnb in Downtown Atlanta, with 123 years of history.
news.summary: Atlanta-based company Vaycaychella, Inc. (OTC Pink: VAYK) has declared the renewal of its joint-venture deal to refurbish and manage Rufus Rose House. Situated in downtown Atlanta, this Victorian mansion boasts a rich history spanning 123 years.

news.headline: Inventor from Enterprise, Ala. creates CHILDS BOOSTER CHAIR MUSIC BOX - a booster seat that plays music.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 12, 2024, an inventor from Enterprise, Ala. shared plans for a new innovation - the CHILDS BOOSTER CHAIR MUSIC BOX. The inventor expressed their desire to create a children's accessory that doubles as a booster seat and music box. This unique design aims to provide both functionality and aesthetic value. The specifics regarding production numbers, potential market availability, and pricing were not disclosed.

news.headline: UAB “Valstybės investicinis kapitalas” approved investment of up to EUR 71,050,000 in UAB EPSO-G Invest.
news.summary: "UAB “Valstybės investicinis kapitalas” announced that on December 11, 2024, the Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Lithuania, as the company's sole shareholder, approved a decision made by the company's board on December 9, 2024. This decision involves an investment of up to EUR 71,050,000 in UAB EPSO-G Invest (company code 306949519). The investment includes acquiring shares of UAB EPSO-G Invest valued at EUR 18,375,000 and a commitment to invest an additional EUR 52,675,000 in UAB EPSO-G Invest through capital or other means. Furthermore, the approval allows for the signing of a shareholders' agreement with UAB EPSO-G (company code 302826889) for the acquisition of shares in UAB EPSO-G Invest, as outlined in the board's decision."

news.headline: A Shiba Inu billionaire bet 37 ETH, avoids hefty taxes, and once unknowingly created a honeypot.
news.summary: A prominent Shiba Inu whale known as Shibtoshi has disclosed a strategy to avoid hefty capital gains taxes, alongside an incident where he mistakenly developed a honeypot. The individual shared insights on navigating tax liabilities due to significant cryptocurrency gains, shedding light on his approach. Additionally, the revelation of inadvertently creating a honeypot underscores the unpredictable nature of engaging in cryptocurrency ventures. This disclosure provides a glimpse into the complexities and challenges faced by high-profile cryptocurrency investors like Shibtoshi.

news.headline: Keros Therapeutics stock drops 77% as side effects halt lung disease study.
news.summary: Keros Therapeutics saw a sharp decline in its stock on Thursday following the decision to halt the administration of higher doses in a study on lung disease due to unforeseen side effects. The company's shares plummeted by 77% after the unexpected adverse reactions impacted its lead drug.

news.headline: Earnest Analytics introduces new Customer Groups using Orion data, going beyond demographics. Dec 12, 2024. #DataAnalytics #Investors #Companies.
news.summary: Earnest Analytics, a prominent data analytics company based in New York, announced on December 12, 2024, the release of Customer Groups driven by Orion transaction data. These new segments are designed to provide more in-depth insights for investors, businesses, and consulting firms. By moving beyond basic demographic information, Earnest Analytics aims to offer a more comprehensive understanding of customer behavior. This development signifies a strategic move by the company to enhance its services and cater to a wider range of clients.
